title: Paper Library
description: Browse imported literature with AI-enhanced summaries and saved favorites.

papersPage.title: Paper Library
papersPage.description: Search, filter, and read imported papers.

favoritesPage.title: Favorites
favoritesPage.description: Your saved papers, organized into folders.

importPage.title: Import
importPage.description: Bring JSON or JSONL paper data into LifeForge.

runPage.title: Run
runPage.description: Launch fetch, recommend, and enhance jobs for the current paper pool.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Configure shared fetch sources and your personal Zotero and AI pipeline.

abstractReviewPage.title: Abstract Review
abstractReviewPage.description: Inspect extracted abstracts, fix them manually, and open the source URL in a new tab.

paperDetailPage.title: Paper detail
paperDetailPage.description: Read the translated title, TL;DR, and abstract of one paper.

papers.title: No papers found
papers.description: Import papers or loosen the current filters.

favorites.title: No favorites yet
favorites.description: Star papers from the list page to keep them here.

batches.title: No imports yet
batches.description: Your recent import history will appear here.

abstractReview.title: No papers match this review queue
abstractReview.description: Adjust the source or fetch date filters to inspect another batch.
